content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://eureka.patsnap.com/report-what-catalyst-innovations-improve-efficiency-in-green-hydrogen-electrolysis", "source_title": "What catalyst innovations improve efficiency in green hydrogen ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Recent research has pivoted toward developing high-performance, earth-abundant catalysts that can match or exceed the performance of preciou...", "direct_quote": "Recent research has pivoted toward developing high-performance, earth-abundant catalysts that can match or exceed the performance of precious metal counterparts.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Researchers aim to develop catalysts that can reduce the overpotential required for water splitting, thereby increasing energy efficiency fr...", "direct_quote": "Researchers aim to develop catalysts that can reduce the overpotential required for water splitting, thereby increasing energy efficiency from the current industry standard of 65-75% toward the theoretical maximum of 94%.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Additionally, catalyst innovations seek to extend operational lifetimes beyond 50,000 hours while reducing degradation rates under fluctuati...", "direct_quote": "Additionally, catalyst innovations seek to extend operational lifetimes beyond 50,000 hours while reducing degradation rates under fluctuating load conditions typical in renewable energy systems.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
